metadata.description: Pulse: validate-first agentic development ecosystem for planning, validation, swarming, and execution

plugins.name: pulse:using-pulse
plugins.description: Bootstrap meta-skill: routing, go mode, skill catalog, state bootstrap/resume

plugins.name: pulse:preflight
plugins.description: Tool readiness check, mode selection (full/degraded), and project tooling status

plugins.name: pulse:exploring
plugins.description: Extract locked decisions via Socratic dialogue before planning begins

plugins.name: pulse:planning
plugins.description: Research codebase, synthesize approach, decompose into executable beads

plugins.name: pulse:validating
plugins.description: Plan verification (8 dimensions), spike execution for HIGH risk, bead polishing

plugins.name: pulse:swarming
plugins.description: Launch and tend parallel worker agents via Agent Mail

plugins.name: pulse:executing
plugins.description: Per-agent worker loop: self-route from bead graph, implement, close, report

plugins.name: pulse:reviewing
plugins.description: Specialist review passes, 3-level artifact verification, UAT gate

plugins.name: pulse:dream
plugins.description: Manual dream-style consolidation over Codex artifacts into durable Pulse learnings

plugins.name: pulse:debugging
plugins.description: Systematic debugging for blocked workers, test failures, and build errors

plugins.name: pulse:gkg
plugins.description: Codebase intelligence via gkg tool for architecture and dependency analysis

plugins.name: pulse:writing-pulse-skills
plugins.description: TDD-for-skills meta-skill with pressure testing and persuasion psychology

plugins.name: ai-multimodal
plugins.description: Process and generate multimedia content with Google Gemini across audio, images, video, and documents

plugins.name: prompt-leverage
plugins.description: Upgrade raw prompts into stronger execution-ready prompts

plugins.name: simplify-code
plugins.description: Review git diff or file scope for reuse, quality, efficiency, and standards issues

plugins.name: systematic-debug-fix
plugins.description: Root-cause-first bug fixing with fix tracking and regression lock-down
